name: accounting firms managing 10–20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts due to manual data entry.
features: email notifications to finance ops teams
